- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
  Summary: File created in project .github folder.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  Summary: Requirements were explicitly provided for SheCare frontend stack, pages, and UI constraints.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  Summary: Vite React TypeScript project scaffolded in current directory.

- [x] Customize the Project
  Summary: Built SheCare app architecture, routes, pages, mock data, animations, Tailwind theme system, and reusable components.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  Summary: No extensions needed from project setup info.

- [x] Compile the Project
  Summary: Dependencies installed and project build/lint validation executed.

- [x] Create and Run Task
  Summary: Existing npm scripts are sufficient; separate VS Code task creation skipped.

- [x] Launch the Project
  Summary: User confirmed launch; Vite dev server started successfully.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  Summary: README and copilot-instructions are updated to match current project state.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
